blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
